title: OPF Slide Layout
description: Schema for slide-layout records in the pptx.gallery library. Each record describes a single named slide layout — what kind of content it holds, how that content is arranged on the slide, and which slide-master it pairs with. Layouts are referenced from OPF documents via Slide.layout; the engine resolves the reference against catalogs.layouts (inline) → catalogs.layouts.source → the default catalog at https://www.pptx.gallery/layouts. Free-form custom layout names that don't resolve through any catalog fall through to engine-defined layouts.

$schema.description: Identifies this record as a slide layout in the pptx.dev library.

id.description: Stable slug used by OPF documents to reference this layout via Slide.layout. Lowercase kebab-case.

name.description: Internal layout name (often Title_Case_With_Underscores matching the engine's master deck).

label.description: Human-readable label shown in layout pickers.

summary.description: One-sentence positioning of the layout — when to reach for it.
examples: Slide title aligned left over a single content area — flexible workhorse layout.
Title plus a single chart on the left and supporting copy on the right.

description.description: Longer prose describing the layout structure and ideal use cases.
examples: Two equal-width columns under a left-aligned slide title. Use when comparing two ideas, before/after pairs, or paired text + image content.

master.description: Name of the slide-master deck this layout belongs to.

masterSlideIndex.description: Zero-based index of this layout within its master deck.

groupHash.description: Stable content-addressed hash that groups visually similar layouts. Layouts with the same groupHash share a content footprint and can be hot-swapped.

groupDefault.description: Whether this layout is the default within its groupHash bucket.

contentType.description: Primary kind of content the layout holds. Drives pickers and AI placement decisions.

contentMultiple.description: How many parallel content blocks the layout exposes ('2x' = two-column, '3x' = three-up, etc.).

contentAlignment.description: Default horizontal alignment of the content area.

contentBox.description: Whether the content area is rendered inside a visible box / card.

contentTypeChartPrimary.description: For chart layouts, where the primary chart sits relative to the rest of the content.

contentTypeImageFill.description: For image layouts, how the image fills its slot.

contentTypeListBullet.description: For list layouts, how bullets are rendered.

contentTypeListHeading.description: For list layouts, whether each list item carries a heading.

slideTag.description: Whether the layout includes a small slide-level tag / label region above or near the title.

slideTitle.description: Whether the layout includes a slide title region.

slideSubtitle.description: Whether the layout includes a slide-level subtitle or supporting-description region.

slideTitleAlignment.description: Horizontal alignment of the slide title region.

slideImage.description: Whether the layout includes a dedicated slide-level image region (separate from any content image).

slideImageAlignment.description: Where the slide-level image sits relative to the content.

slideLayoutDirection.description: Axis along which the layout's primary regions are arranged.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and search.

preview.description: Visual previews of the record, used by picker UIs and inline rendering. All sub-fields are optional; engines fall back gracefully when previews aren't available.

src.description: Main preview image (PNG/JPG). Used as the primary visual in picker UIs and previews of the record.

thumbnailSrc.description: Smaller thumbnail preview suited to dense grid views.

vectorSrc.description: SVG / vector preview for crisp scaling at any size.
